description:
A smarter, more precise version of GPT-5.4 that leverages additional compute to think harder and provide consistently better answers. Designed to tackle your toughest problems, this model operates with the highest reasoning capability to ensure maximum accuracy on complex tasks.

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
